index.html.title: R. Courtney Painting | San Mateo Painters Since 2005
index.html.description: San Mateo's trusted painting contractor for 20+ years. Interior, exterior, cabinet, and commercial painting on the Peninsula. Free estimates. CSLB #918114.

about.html.title: About | R. Courtney Painting — 20+ Years on the Peninsula
about.html.description: Ryan Courtney has painted Peninsula homes for over 20 years. Family-run, licensed CSLB #918114. Heirloom-quality work, done right the first time.

blog.html.title: Painting Tips & News | R. Courtney Painting
blog.html.description: Painting advice, color guidance, and project updates from R. Courtney Painting in San Mateo, CA.

contact.html.title: Contact Us | R. Courtney Painting San Mateo
contact.html.description: Call (650) 921-5694 or request a free estimate. R. Courtney Painting serves San Mateo, Hillsborough, Atherton, and the Peninsula.

service.html.title: Painting Services | R. Courtney Painting San Mateo
service.html.description: Interior, exterior, cabinets, fence & deck staining, drywall, pressure washing. Licensed and insured. Serving the Peninsula since 2005.

services/cabinets.html.title: Cabinet Refinishing | R. Courtney Painting San Mateo
services/cabinets.html.description: Refinish your kitchen cabinets without replacing them. Professional cabinet painting on the Peninsula by R. Courtney Painting.

services/doors-and-shelves.html.title: Door & Shelf Painting | R. Courtney Painting San Mateo
services/doors-and-shelves.html.description: Crisp, durable finishes on doors, trim, and built-in shelving. The Peninsula's trusted painter for over 20 years.

services/interior-walls.html.title: Interior Wall Painting | R. Courtney Painting San Mateo
services/interior-walls.html.description: Transform any room with professional interior painting. Color consultation, prep, and a flawless finish — every time.
